n: 他 is a singular third person masculine pronoun or used when the sex of the person is unknown or unimportant (NCCED '他' 2; Sun 2006, loc. 357).
他 is a singular third person masculine pronoun or used when the sex of the person is unknown or unimportant
For example, 齐心协力 'join minds and combine forces'

e: to press from either side; to sandwich
